TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Adama Barrow (Kari Ingkoku: Adama Barrow; kngkawas 1965 idas 2 diyax 16Ôľć), Soto Gambia saya. Kiya ka seyji jnwu Gambia, Ryeynhe Mincu Tangweyn. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Adama Barrow pa mnniq London ngalan anjey cingwey, kngkkawas 2000 tbrinah miyah Gambia, mniq kngkawas 2016 kcka Gambia Soto seyngkyo skulan Hantay Ryeynmong pusu balay howeynjn, muda pnsung Soto Yeyhayya Cyamey, kiya u mniq idas 12 diyax 1 knbeuhing seyngkyo cida u wada niya ini baka ka Cyamey mi wada mangal Soto. Kiya u Cyamey u mn1ini sruwa muru ndanan seyngkyo mi lmutuc qmpah Soto nina, kiya ka wada muda qnlqilan syeyncng ka cida. Kngkawas 2017 idas 19, Adama Barrow pa mniq Senegal na Gambia Taskwan muda psdhu phiyu Soto. Bukuy daw alaw Tuiwil Afrika Qnlhangan Keyjay Kongtongti (ECOWAS) ka muda pddayak muruc, kiya mi snlaul butay tnpusu tnayus qnburang cida, kiya ka hana smruwa muway biyax seyhu ka Cyamey, kiya daw Adama Barrow u mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 26 babaw cka hidaw kndadax Senegal tbrinah miyax Bancu, knkana sediq Gambia u snbeyhing bay mqaras smsung pcmiyah snturung taxa burah Soto niya. ABC ONLINE ka muda pkla, Adama Barrow pa snquri ECOWAS meysa mi dmurun dnyawan butay dha tnpusu mniq Gambia mk6 idas dungan, so musa mdhu ka seyji dha. UN tukubeycu dayhyo Chambs ka tuhuy Adama Barrow tbrinah miyah qnlhangan, kiya nuri u dmayaw muda psdhu knpriyux biyax seyhu. CngceśĒŅÁ≠Ė Kngkawas 2017 idas 1, Adama Barrow pa wada niya pryuxan 'Gambia Konghkwo' ka hangan qnlhangan.
S.PHON: adama ba…ĺ…ĺow (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: adama ba…ĺ…ĺow; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), soto gambia saja. kija ka s…ô…üi …ünwu gambia, …ĺj…ônńß…ô min ¶u taŇčw…ôn. kndusan** adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa mnniq london Ňčalan an…ü…ô ¶iŇčw…ô, kŇčkkawas **** tb…ĺinańß mijańß gambia, mniq kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka gambia soto s…ôŇčkjo skulan ńßantaj …ĺj…ônmoŇč pusu balaj ńßow…ôn…ün, muda pnsuŇč soto j…ôńßajja ¶jam…ô, kija u mniq idas ** dijax * knb…ôuńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada nija ini baka ka ¶jam…ô mi wada maŇčal soto. kija u ¶jam…ô u mn*ini s…ĺuwa mu…ĺu ndanan s…ôŇčkjo mi lmutu ¶ qmpańß soto nina, kija ka wada muda qnlqilan sj…ôn ¶Ňč ka ¶ida. kŇčkawas **** idas **, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa mniq s…ôn…ôgal na gambia taskwan muda psdńßu pńßiju soto. bukuj daw alaw tuiwil a*…ĺika qnlńßaŇčan k…ô…üaj koŇčtoŇčti (…ô ¶owas) ka muda pddajak mu…ĺu ¶, kija mi snlaul butaj tnpusu tnajus qnbu…ĺaŇč ¶ida, kija ka ńßana sm…ĺuwa muwaj bijax s…ôńßu ka ¶jam…ô, kija daw adama ba…ĺ…ĺow u mniq dijax tndx…ĺal ńßija kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** babaw ¶ka ńßidaw kndadax s…ôn…ôgal tb…ĺinańß mijax ban ¶u, knkana s…ôdiq gambia u snb…ôńßiŇč baj mqa…ĺas smsuŇč p ¶mijańß sntu…ĺuŇč taxa bu…ĺańß soto nija. ab ¶ onlin…ô ka muda pkla, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa snqu…ĺi …ô ¶owas m…ôsa mi dmu…ĺun dnjawan butaj dńßa tnpusu mniq gambia mk* idas duŇčan, so musa mdńßu ka s…ô…üi dńßa. un tukub…ô ¶u dajńßjo ¶ńßambs ka tuńßuj adama ba…ĺ…ĺow tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan, kija nu…ĺi u dmajaw muda psdńßu knp…ĺijux bijax s…ôńßu. ¶Ňč ¶…ô** kŇčkawas **** idas *, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa wada nija p…ĺjuxan 'gambia koŇčńßkwo' ka ńßaŇčan qnlńßaŇčan.
S.FORM: Adama Barrow (Kari Ingkoku: Adama Barrow; kngkawas 1965 idas 2 diyax 16Ôľć), Soto Gambia saya. Kiya ka seyji jnwu Gambia, Ryeynhe Mincu Tangweyn. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Adama Barrow pa mnniq London ngalan anjey cingwey, kngkkawas 2000 tbrinah miyah Gambia, mniq kngkawas 2016 kcka Gambia Soto seyngkyo skulan Hantay Ryeynmong pusu balay howeynjn, muda pnsung Soto Yeyhayya Cyamey, kiya u mniq idas 12 diyax 1 knbeuhing seyngkyo cida u wada niya ini baka ka Cyamey mi wada mangal Soto. Kiya u Cyamey u mn1ini sruwa muru ndanan seyngkyo mi lmutuc qmpah Soto nina, kiya ka wada muda qnlqilan syeyncng ka cida. Kngkawas 2017 idas 19, Adama Barrow pa mniq Senegal na Gambia Taskwan muda psdhu phiyu Soto. Bukuy daw alaw Tuiwil Afrika Qnlhangan Keyjay Kongtongti (ECOWAS) ka muda pddayak muruc, kiya mi snlaul butay tnpusu tnayus qnburang cida, kiya ka hana smruwa muway biyax seyhu ka Cyamey, kiya daw Adama Barrow u mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2017 idas 1 diyax 26 babaw cka hidaw kndadax Senegal tbrinah miyax Bancu, knkana sediq Gambia u snbeyhing bay mqaras smsung pcmiyah snturung taxa burah Soto niya. ABC ONLINE ka muda pkla, Adama Barrow pa snquri ECOWAS meysa mi dmurun dnyawan butay dha tnpusu mniq Gambia mk6 idas dungan, so musa mdhu ka seyji dha. UN tukubeycu dayhyo Chambs ka tuhuy Adama Barrow tbrinah miyah qnlhangan, kiya nuri u dmayaw muda psdhu knpriyux biyax seyhu. CngceśĒŅÁ≠Ė Kngkawas 2017 idas 1, Adama Barrow pa wada niya pryuxan 'Gambia Konghkwo' ka hangan qnlhangan.
S.PHON: adama ba…ĺ…ĺow (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: adama ba…ĺ…ĺow; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), soto gambia saja. kija ka s…ô…üi …ünwu gambia, …ĺj…ônńß…ô min ¶u taŇčw…ôn. kndusan** adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa mnniq london Ňčalan an…ü…ô ¶iŇčw…ô, kŇčkkawas **** tb…ĺinańß mijańß gambia, mniq kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka gambia soto s…ôŇčkjo skulan ńßantaj …ĺj…ônmoŇč pusu balaj ńßow…ôn…ün, muda pnsuŇč soto j…ôńßajja ¶jam…ô, kija u mniq idas ** dijax * knb…ôuńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada nija ini baka ka ¶jam…ô mi wada maŇčal soto. kija u ¶jam…ô u mn*ini s…ĺuwa mu…ĺu ndanan s…ôŇčkjo mi lmutu ¶ qmpańß soto nina, kija ka wada muda qnlqilan sj…ôn ¶Ňč ka ¶ida. kŇčkawas **** idas **, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa mniq s…ôn…ôgal na gambia taskwan muda psdńßu pńßiju soto. bukuj daw alaw tuiwil a*…ĺika qnlńßaŇčan k…ô…üaj koŇčtoŇčti (…ô ¶owas) ka muda pddajak mu…ĺu ¶, kija mi snlaul butaj tnpusu tnajus qnbu…ĺaŇč ¶ida, kija ka ńßana sm…ĺuwa muwaj bijax s…ôńßu ka ¶jam…ô, kija daw adama ba…ĺ…ĺow u mniq dijax tndx…ĺal ńßija kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** babaw ¶ka ńßidaw kndadax s…ôn…ôgal tb…ĺinańß mijax ban ¶u, knkana s…ôdiq gambia u snb…ôńßiŇč baj mqa…ĺas smsuŇč p ¶mijańß sntu…ĺuŇč taxa bu…ĺańß soto nija. ab ¶ onlin…ô ka muda pkla, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa snqu…ĺi …ô ¶owas m…ôsa mi dmu…ĺun dnjawan butaj dńßa tnpusu mniq gambia mk* idas duŇčan, so musa mdńßu ka s…ô…üi dńßa. un tukub…ô ¶u dajńßjo ¶ńßambs ka tuńßuj adama ba…ĺ…ĺow tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan, kija nu…ĺi u dmajaw muda psdńßu knp…ĺijux bijax s…ôńßu. ¶Ňč ¶…ô** kŇčkawas **** idas *, adama ba…ĺ…ĺow pa wada nija p…ĺjuxan 'gambia koŇčńßkwo' ka ńßaŇčan qnlńßaŇčan.
